events.summary: T8 (G3 dual-outlet pattern doc) shipped via FT2 chore PR. New doc at docs/case-studies/dual-outlet-pattern.md (~9 sections, 11KB). Establishes the contract between FT2 source case study and fitme-story slot MDX. Unblocks T9 (G5 timeline frontmatter audit) by giving G5 a concrete checklist (§7) to walk against.
